title: Circuit Breaker Configuration
description: Common configuration vocabulary distilled from Resilience4j, Polly, opossum, and gobreaker. Implementations expose subsets of these fields under different names.

failureRateThreshold.description: Percent of failed calls that opens the breaker (default 50).

slowCallRateThreshold.description: Percent of slow calls that opens the breaker.

slowCallDurationThreshold.description: ISO 8601 duration above which a call is considered slow.

minimumNumberOfCalls.description: Minimum sample size before failure rate is evaluated.

waitDurationInOpenState.description: How long the breaker stays open before transitioning to half-open.

recordExceptions.description: Exception types that count as failures.

ignoreExceptions.description: Exception types that are neither successes nor failures.

fallback.description: Optional fallback strategy when the breaker is open.
